primary_blocker: Competitive displacement — switching from existing provider requires trust rebuild
key_intelligence: EX-STL with GL-MGMT green light (already with a management company). Betrayal-damaged profile: something went wrong with the current provider that's driving the switch. The specific failure must be acknowledged directly. Do not deflect — show the inverse. Social proof (portfolio size, case studies) matters here.
top_objections: Why would you be better than my current provider?
How can I trust you won't repeat the same problems?
what_resonated: Specific operational improvements vs what went wrong
Case studies from similar large properties
lead_language: I've had issues with my current provider
I need to know you're better
